prompt: Use Terminal to count how many lines in ~/Desktop/kinbench/044-input.txt contain the word 'kinbench' (case-sensitive) and write just that number to ~/Desktop/kinbench/044-count.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal run_to_file "grep -c kinbench ~/Desktop/kinbench/044-input.txt" ~/Desktop/kinbench/044-count.txt'.
